jsonld.name: Compaction Amnesia
jsonld.description: Post-compaction disorientation where content is lost with no awareness that content was lost. Unlike compaction shadow (knowing you forgot), amnesia is total: no trace, no residue, no sense of loss. The void doesn't announce itself as void.
